prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津大学在江苏省物理类最低录取位次分别为约5594名、5628名、6253名、5059名、9279名。2021–2024年位次在5000–6300名区间波动，2025年大幅后移至9279名，近一年后移约4220名，主要受当年扩招及考生人数激增影响；天津大学在江苏省物理类计划数：2021年106人、2022年106人、2023年107人、2024年118人、2025年128人，呈逐年扩招趋势；2026年计划缩至106人，较2025年减少22人（缩招约17.2%），缩招将加剧竞争，理论上推动录取位次前移（数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第20名（2021年第22名→2022年第21名→2023年第21名→2024年第20名→2025年第20名），排名稳中有升，属全国顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理或回应、师德师风事件（PPT贬低专业争议、考试作弊回应争议等），但整体影响有限；抖音热度排名第66位（评价为一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；2021–2025年无投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，天津大学拥有20个A-及以上学科，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程为A+；仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、城乡规划学、建筑学、机械工程、水利工程等8个学科为A；另有化学、数学、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程、生物医学工程、电子科学与技术、电气工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、风景园林学等10个学科为A-，工科实力极为雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与天津大学优势学科高度匹配；江苏省物理类考生数持续增长（2021年16.6万→2025年26.1万），2026年总考生52.1万人，按近年物理类占比约73%估算约38万人，竞争进一步加剧；省控线（本科批）逐年上升（2021年417分→2025年463分），反映整体竞争强度增加；天津大学位于天津市，非江苏省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；江苏省考生对京津地区高校认可度较高，地域偏好属中等偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次9279名、2026年计划大幅缩招（128→106人，缩招17.2%）推动位次前移、江苏省物理类考生持续增长加剧竞争、学校顶尖层次与优势学科保持强吸引力、声誉热度无明显负面冲击等因素。预测2026年天津大学在江苏省物理类最低录取位次约8322名，波动区间7822–8822名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约8322名，区间7822–8822名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<7822名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（未来技术学院、电气信息类、智能与计算类）；位次接近区间上限（>8822名）应以三档专业为主、二档为辅，确保录取。天津大学工科实力全国顶尖，各试验班均提供大类分流任选机会，报考性价比极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin University in Jiangsu Province Physics Category were approximately 5594, 5628, 6253, 5059, and 9279 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 5000 and 6300 from 2021 to 2024, but shifted significantly backward to 9279 in 2025, moving back about 4220 positions in the last year, mainly due to enrollment expansion and a surge in the number of examinees that year. The planned enrollment numbers for Tianjin University in Jiangsu Province Physics Category were: 106 in 2021, 106 in 2022, 107 in 2023, 118 in 2024, and 128 in 2025, showing a trend of year-on-year expansion. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 106, a decrease of 22 from 2025 (a reduction of about 17.2%). This reduction will intensify competition, theoretically pushing the admission ranking forward (decreasing the number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 20th (22nd in 2021 → 21st in 2022 → 21st in 2023 → 20th in 2024 → 20th in 2025), with a stable and slightly rising ranking, placing it among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management or responses, teacher ethics incidents (PPT disparaging professional controversies, exam cheating response controversies, etc.), but the overall impact is limited. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 66th (evaluation: average), with moderate short video exposure, showing no clear signs of increased application attention. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cutoff line breaks. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Tianjin University has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering as A+. Eight disciplines are rated A: Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Architecture, Mechanical Engineering, and Water Conservancy Engineering. Additionally, 10 disciplines are rated A-: Chemistry, Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, and Landscape Architecture. Its engineering strength is extremely strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, which aligns well with Tianjin University's advantageous disciplines. The number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province has been growing continuously (166,000 in 2021 → 261,000 in 2025). In 2026, the total number of examinees is 521,000, with an estimated 380,000 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 73%, further intensifying competition. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) has been rising year by year (417 in 2021 → 463 in 2025), reflecting increased overall competition intensity. Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, not a local university in Jiangsu Province, so there is no local enrollment preference. Jiangsu Province examinees have a relatively high recognition of universities in the Beijing-Tianjin region, with a moderately positive regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 9279, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (128 to 106, a reduction of 17.2%) pushing the ranking forward, the continuous growth of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu Province intensifying competition, the strong attractiveness of the university's top level and advantageous disciplines, and no significant negative impact from reputation or popularity, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tianjin University in Jiangsu Province Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 8322, with a fluctuation range of 7822 to 8822.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 8322, with a range of 7822 to 8822. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<7822), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Future Technology College, Electrical and Information, Intelligence and Computing). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>8822), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2, to ensure admission. Tianjin University's engineering strength is top in the country, and each experimental class offers the opportunity to freely choose a major within the broad category, making it highly cost-effective to apply.
